section_miscategorizations.text: Order hemoglobin and complete blood count.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed as an order in the Plan section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Schedule an endoscopy and colonoscopy for further evaluation of the right lower quadrant tenderness and to rule out gastrointestinal bleeding.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic procedure order and appropriately belongs in the Plan section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Continue toprol 25mg twice daily and lisinopril 10mg daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Although these are existing medications, the directive to continue them is a management decision and belongs in the Plan.
Same as above: this is an explicit treatment plan instruction.

section_miscategorizations.text: Refer to gastroenterology for endoscopy and colonoscopy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Referrals are correctly placed in the Plan section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Follow up in one week to review lab results and discuss further management.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Follow-up timing and purpose are appropriately documented in the Plan.
